_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: The Nf1-PS rats have the earliest onset tumors (8 weeks), followed by Nf1-IFPS (10 weeks), followed by Nf1-IF (1 year)
details: Nf1-PS rats have earliest onset tumors at 8 weeks, followed by Nf1-IFPS at 10 weeks, followed by Nf1-IF at 1 year
